input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.1.4
            TITLE: if the accumulator container is not constructed from steel or aluminum, the material

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.1.4: If the Accumulator Container is not constructed from steel or aluminum, the material
F.10.1.4 If the Accumulator Container is not constructed from steel or aluminum, the material 
properties should be established at a temperature of 60°C

final_answer: rule F.10.1.4: If the Accumulator Container is not constructed from steel or aluminum, the material properties should be established at a temperature of 60°C
